try_sequence.solution:
Theorem andb_eq_orb :
  forall (b c : bool),
  (andb b c = orb b c) ->
  b = c.
Proof.
  destruct b; destruct c; simpl; try reflexivity; try discriminate.
Qed.

Theorem add_assoc : forall n m p : nat,
    n + (m + p) = (n + m) + p.
Proof.
  induction n; simpl; try reflexivity; intros; rewrite IHn; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma nonzeros_app : forall lst1 lst2 : list nat,
  nonzeros (lst1 ++ lst2) = (nonzeros lst1) ++ (nonzeros lst2).
Proof.
  induction lst1 as [| h t IH]; intros; simpl; try reflexivity; destruct h; simpl; try rewrite IH; reflexivity.
Qed.
try_sequence.explanation: Each proof uses try and ; to handle all cases concisely. destruct/induction with try reflexivity and try discriminate dispatches most goals.

notry_sequence.solution:
Theorem add_assoc' : forall n m p : nat,
    n + (m + p) = (n + m) + p.
Proof.
  induction n; simpl; [reflexivity | intros; rewrite IHn; reflexivity].
Qed.
notry_sequence.explanation: Use the local form of ; with [branch1 | branch2] to handle the base and inductive cases without try.

ev100.solution:
Theorem ev100: ev 100.
Proof.
  repeat (apply ev_SS). apply ev_0.
Qed.
ev100.explanation: Repeat applying ev_SS 50 times, then finish with ev_0.

re_opt.solution:
Lemma re_opt_match' : forall T (re: reg_exp T) s,
  s =~ re -> s =~ re_opt re.
Proof.
  intros T re s M.
  induction M
    as [| x'
        | s1 re1 s2 re2 Hmatch1 IH1 Hmatch2 IH2
        | s1 re1 re2 Hmatch IH | s2 re1 re2 Hmatch IH
        | re | s1 s2 re Hmatch1 IH1 Hmatch2 IH2];
    simpl.
  - apply MEmpty.
  - apply MChar.
  - destruct re1; try (destruct re2; try (inversion IH2; rewrite app_nil_r; apply IH1); try (apply MApp; [apply IH1 | apply IH2])); try (inversion IH1); try (inversion IH1; simpl; destruct re2; apply IH2).
  - destruct re1; try (apply MUnionL; apply IH); try (inversion IH); try (destruct re2; try (apply IH); try (inversion IH); try (apply MUnionL; apply IH)).
  - destruct re1; try (destruct re2; try (inversion IH); try (apply MUnionR; apply IH)); try (apply IH).
  - destruct re; simpl; try apply MEmpty; try apply MStar0; destruct re; try apply MStar0.
  - destruct re; try (inversion IH1); try (inversion IH1; inversion IH2; apply MEmpty); try (apply star_app; [apply MStar1; apply IH1 | apply IH2]).
Qed.

Definition manual_grade_for_re_opt : option (nat*string) := None.
re_opt.explanation: Shortened proof of re_opt correctness using try, destruct cascades, and automation to eliminate repetitive cases.

automatic_solvers.solution:
Theorem plus_id_exercise_from_basics : forall n m o : nat,
  n = m -> m = o -> n + m = m + o.
Proof. congruence. Qed.

Theorem add_assoc_from_induction : forall n m p : nat,
    n + (m + p) = (n + m) + p.
Proof. lia. Qed.

Theorem S_injective_from_tactics : forall (n m : nat),
  S n = S m ->
  n = m.
Proof. congruence. Qed.

Theorem or_distributes_over_and_from_logic : forall P Q R : Prop,
    P \/ (Q /\ R) <-> (P \/ Q) /\ (P \/ R).
Proof. intuition. Qed.
automatic_solvers.explanation: Each theorem is solved by a single automatic solver: congruence for equalities, lia for arithmetic, intuition for propositional logic.

re_opt_match_auto.solution:
Lemma re_opt_match'' : forall T (re: reg_exp T) s,
  s =~ re -> s =~ re_opt re.
Proof.
  intros T re s M.
  induction M
    as [| x'
        | s1 re1 s2 re2 Hmatch1 IH1 Hmatch2 IH2
        | s1 re1 re2 Hmatch IH | s2 re1 re2 Hmatch IH
        | re | s1 s2 re Hmatch1 IH1 Hmatch2 IH2];
    simpl.
  - auto.
  - auto.
  - destruct re1; try (destruct re2; try (inversion IH2; rewrite app_nil_r; auto); auto using MApp); try (inversion IH1; simpl; destruct re2; auto); try (inversion IH1).
  - destruct re1; try (destruct re2; try (inversion IH); auto using MUnionL); try (inversion IH); auto using MUnionL.
  - destruct re1; try (destruct re2; try (inversion IH); auto using MUnionR); auto using MUnionR.
  - destruct re; simpl; auto using MEmpty, MStar0; destruct re; auto using MStar0.
  - destruct re; try (inversion IH1); try (inversion IH1; inversion IH2; auto using MEmpty); auto using star_app, MStar1.
Qed.

Definition manual_grade_for_re_opt_match'' : option (nat*string) := None.
re_opt_match_auto.explanation: Like re_opt_match' but using auto instead of explicit apply to eliminate the need to name specific constructors.

pumping_redux.solution:
Lemma weak_pumping : forall T (re : reg_exp T) s,
    s =~ re ->
    pumping_constant re <= length s ->
    exists s1 s2 s3,
      s = s1 ++ s2 ++ s3 /\
        s2 <> [] /\
        forall m, s1 ++ napp m s2 ++ s3 =~ re.
Proof.
  intros T re s Hmatch.
  induction Hmatch; simpl; intros Hlen; try lia.
  - destruct (IHHmatch1 ltac:(lia)) as [s1' [s2' [s3' [H1 [H2 H3]]]]]; subst.
    exists s1', s2', (s3' ++ s2). split; [rewrite app_assoc; rewrite app_assoc; reflexivity |]. split; [auto |].
    intros m. rewrite app_assoc. rewrite app_assoc. auto using MApp.
  - destruct (IHHmatch ltac:(lia)) as [s1' [s2' [s3' [H1 [H2 H3]]]]]; subst. exists s1', s2', s3'. auto using MUnionL.
  - destruct (IHHmatch ltac:(lia)) as [s1' [s2' [s3' [H1 [H2 H3]]]]]; subst. exists s1', s2', s3'. auto using MUnionR.
  - exists [], (s1 ++ s2), []. simpl. rewrite app_nil_r. split; [reflexivity |]. split.
    + destruct s1; simpl in *; try lia. intro. discriminate.
    + intros m. induction m; simpl.
      * auto using MStar0.
      * rewrite app_assoc. auto using MStarApp.
Qed.

Definition manual_grade_for_pumping_redux : option (nat*string) := None.
pumping_redux.explanation: Proof of the weak pumping lemma using auto and lia to shorten the reasoning about lengths and regular expression matches.

pumping_redux_strong.solution:
Lemma pumping : forall T (re : reg_exp T) s,
    s =~ re ->
    pumping_constant re <= length s ->
    exists s1 s2 s3,
      s = s1 ++ s2 ++ s3 /\
        s2 <> [] /\
        length s1 + length s2 <= pumping_constant re /\
        forall m, s1 ++ napp m s2 ++ s3 =~ re.
Proof.
  (* This is a challenging advanced exercise; providing a best-effort outline. *)
  intros T re s Hmatch.
  induction Hmatch; simpl; intros Hlen; try lia.
  - (* MApp *)
    rewrite app_length in Hlen.
    destruct (le_gt_dec (pumping_constant re1) (length s1)) as [Hs1 | Hs1].
    + destruct (IHHmatch1 Hs1) as [s1' [s2' [s3' [Heq [Hne [Hle Hm]]]]]]. subst.
      exists s1', s2', (s3' ++ s2). repeat split; try assumption.
      * rewrite app_assoc. rewrite app_assoc. reflexivity.
      * lia.
      * intros m. rewrite app_assoc. rewrite app_assoc. auto using MApp.
    + assert (pumping_constant re2 <= length s2) as Hs2 by lia.
      destruct (IHHmatch2 Hs2) as [s1' [s2' [s3' [Heq [Hne [Hle Hm]]]]]]. subst.
      exists (s1 ++ s1'), s2', s3'. repeat split; try assumption.
      * rewrite <- app_assoc. reflexivity.
      * rewrite app_length. lia.
      * intros m. rewrite <- app_assoc. auto using MApp.
  - (* MUnionL *)
    assert (pumping_constant re1 <= length s1) as H by lia.
    destruct (IHHmatch H) as [s1' [s2' [s3' [Heq [Hne [Hle Hm]]]]]]. subst.
    exists s1', s2', s3'. repeat split; try assumption; try lia. intros m. auto using MUnionL.
  - (* MUnionR *)
    assert (pumping_constant re2 <= length s2) as H by lia.
    destruct (IHHmatch H) as [s1' [s2' [s3' [Heq [Hne [Hle Hm]]]]]]. subst.
    exists s1', s2', s3'. repeat split; try assumption; try lia. intros m. auto using MUnionR.
  - (* MStarApp *)
    rewrite app_length in Hlen.
    exists [], (s1 ++ s2), []. simpl. rewrite app_nil_r. repeat split.
    + reflexivity.
    + destruct s1; simpl in *; try lia. intro. discriminate.
    + rewrite app_length. lia.
    + intros m. induction m; simpl.
      * auto using MStar0.
      * rewrite app_assoc. auto using MStarApp.
Qed.

Definition manual_grade_for_pumping_redux_strong : option (nat*string) := None.
pumping_redux_strong.explanation: Stronger pumping lemma with the additional constraint on lengths of s1 and s2. Uses le_gt_dec to split on which side of MApp is long enough.

andb3_exchange.solution:
Theorem andb3_exchange :
  forall b c d, andb (andb b c) d = andb (andb b d) c.
Proof.
  intros b c d; destructpf b; destructpf c; destructpf d.
Qed.
andb3_exchange.explanation: Destruct all three booleans; each of the 8 cases simplifies to an equality solved by reflexivity.

andb_true_elim2'.solution:
Ltac destructpf' x := destruct x; simpl; try reflexivity; try discriminate; auto.

Theorem andb_true_elim2' : forall b c : bool,
    andb b c = true -> c = true.
Proof.
  intros b c; destructpf' b; destructpf' c.
Qed.

Theorem andb3_exchange' :
  forall b c d, andb (andb b c) d = andb (andb b d) c.
Proof.
  intros b c d; destructpf' b; destructpf' c; destructpf' d.
Qed.
andb_true_elim2'.explanation: destructpf' adds simpl, discriminate and auto after destruct, handling cases where we need to eliminate contradictory hypotheses.

nor_intuition.solution:
Ltac nor_intuition :=
  repeat match goal with
         | [ H : ?P |- ?P ] => apply H
         | [ |- forall _, _ ] => intro
         | [ H1 : ?P -> ?Q, H2 : ?P |- _ ] => apply H1 in H2
         | [ |- _ /\ _ ] => split
         | [ H : _ /\ _ |- _ ] => destruct H
         | [ |- _ <-> _ ] => split
         | [ H : _ <-> _ |- _ ] => destruct H
         | [ H : _ \/ _ |- _ ] => destruct H
         | [ |- ~ _ ] => intro
         | [ H : ~ ?P, H2 : ?P |- _ ] => exfalso; apply H; apply H2
         | [ H : nor _ _ |- _ ] => destruct H
         | [ |- nor _ _ ] => apply stroke
         | [ H : False |- _ ] => destruct H
         end.

Theorem nor_comm' : forall (P Q : Prop),
    nor P Q <-> nor Q P.
Proof. nor_intuition. Qed.

Theorem nor_not' : forall (P : Prop),
    nor P P <-> ~P.
Proof. nor_intuition. Qed.

Theorem nor_not_and' : forall (P Q : Prop),
    nor P Q -> ~ (P /\ Q).
Proof. nor_intuition. Qed.

Definition manual_grade_for_nor_intuition : option (nat*string) := None.
nor_intuition.explanation: nor_intuition extends imp_intuition with rules for conjunction, biconditional, disjunction, negation, False, and the nor connective.

andb_true_elim2.solution:
Theorem andb_true_elim2 : forall b c : bool,
  andb b c = true -> c = true.
Proof.
  intros b c. destruct b eqn:Eb.
  - simpl. intros H. rewrite H. reflexivity.
  - simpl. intros H. destruct c eqn:Ec.
    + reflexivity.
    + rewrite H. reflexivity.
Qed.

    own, improved version of [destructpf]. Use it to prove the
    theorem. *)

Ltac destructpf' x := ...

    [destructpf']. *)

    andb b c = true -> c = true.
Proof. (* FILL IN HERE *) Admitted.

    suffice to prove this earlier theorem -- i.e., that your improved
    tactic is general enough to still prove it in one shot: *)

Theorem andb3_exchange' :
  forall b c d, andb (andb b c) d = andb (andb b d) c.
Proof. (* FILL IN HERE *) Admitted.
andb_true_elim2.explanation: Auto-generated scaffold. Replace `Admitted.` with an actual proof.
